targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(duration) as total
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT department) as total
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'
                                AND department IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT activity_type) as total
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'
                                AND activity_type IS NOT NULL

SELECT
                                'Week ' || EXTRACT(WEEK FROM work_date)::text as "Week",
                                EXTRACT(WEEK FROM work_date) as week_num,
                                SUM(duration) as "Hours"
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'
                            GROUP BY EXTRACT(WEEK FROM work_date)
                            ORDER BY week_num

SELECT
                                TO_CHAR(work_date, 'Mon') as "Month",
                                EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date) as month_num,
                                SUM(duration) as "Hours"
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'
                            GROUP BY TO_CHAR(work_date, 'Mon'), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM work_date)
                            ORDER BY month_num

SELECT
                                department as metric,
                                SUM(duration) as value
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'
                            GROUP BY department

SELECT
                                activity_type as metric,
                                SUM(duration) as value
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'
                            GROUP BY activity_type

SELECT
                                work_date as "Date",
                                department as "Department",
                                activity_type as "Activity",
                                duration as "Hours",
                                description as "Description"
                            FROM work_logs
                            WHERE work_date::timestamp >= $__timeFrom()
                                AND work_date::timestamp <= $__timeTo()
                                AND owner_login = '${__user.login}'
                            ORDER BY work_date DESC
                            LIMIT 100
